error_signature: pairedItem can’t be found when intermediate nodes have not executed
title: Intermediate nodes not executed causing pairedItem error
symptom: The workflow fails to finish, throwing an error that 'pairedItem can’t be found' when intermediate nodes have not executed.
applies_when: Last node is dependent on previous nodes' execution
root_cause: The error occurs because the last node is trying to access data from previous nodes that have not executed yet. When using multiple outbound connections, the `.item.json` property cannot be used, leading to the inability to find the required data.
fix_steps: Save the changes to the node
agent_instruction: Update the expression to use `$('Webhook').first().json` and save the node.
